title: Phase 1.2 Repository Integrity Completion
summary: Phase 1.2 turns Diagnostics from file-existence checks into a repository-wide integrity analyzer with source-aware findings and actionable repair guidance.

completedCapabilities.name: Repository-wide ID Graph
completedCapabilities.notes: Builds a shared ID, alias, source, reverse-reference, and dependency model from registered JSON-backed sources.

completedCapabilities.name: Cross-index Validation
completedCapabilities.notes: Validates references across species, lore, moves, abilities, source files, runtime dependencies, and mechanics graph records.

completedCapabilities.name: Duplicate ID Detection
completedCapabilities.notes: Detects duplicate IDs within active record kinds while preserving known global IDs.

completedCapabilities.name: Orphan Record Detection
completedCapabilities.notes: Flags useful records that are not referenced by another indexed record unless intentionally marked as planned or design-seed.

completedCapabilities.name: Runtime Dependency Validation
completedCapabilities.notes: Validates runtime module requirements, missing module references, missing scripts, and load-order risk.

completedCapabilities.name: Mechanics Graph Validation
completedCapabilities.notes: Checks mechanics graph nodes, edges, and declared edge types.

completedCapabilities.name: Knowledge Coverage Metrics
completedCapabilities.notes: Reports per-kind reference, documentation/status, dependency, and coverage score metrics.

completedCapabilities.name: Dependency Explorer
completedCapabilities.notes: Builds source-aware dependency edges and exposes resolved/unresolved target information in the Diagnostics report.

completedCapabilities.name: Source-aware Findings
completedCapabilities.notes: Includes source labels, IDs, and paths on collected references and repair suggestions.

completedCapabilities.name: Actionable Repair Suggestions
completedCapabilities.notes: Maps findings to plain-language repair guidance and affected source paths.

completedCapabilities.name: Documentation Drift Validation
completedCapabilities.notes: Registers README as a diagnostics source and validates roadmap wording against current Phase 1.2 capabilities.

completedCapabilities.name: Repository Health Dashboard
completedCapabilities.notes: Displays health, coverage, milestone cards, findings, dependency edges, repair suggestions, and source status cards.

phase2Handoff.recommendedFirstBuild: Connect runtime visualizer output to the Phase 1.2 validation report so runtime health and repository health can be viewed together.
